body_txt: What to do when you're without a weapon ? Puny Humans must resort to hands and feet (or obtain an Emergency Weapon ). On the other hand, non-human races, animals, and aliens tend to have claws, stings, and other such abilities. This need not involve claws; stingers or even more complex organic weapons count. As long as they're a natural part of the creature's anatomy. Compare Anatomy Arsenal (which can overlap with this; the arsenal is literally part of the user's anatomy), Living Weapon (when the weapon is part of another creature entirely). Any of the following could be one: ... but not always .
